headline: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans. headline: Urban New Construction Is Scarce, Expensive, and in High Demand
summary: Realtor.com® today released its first quarter 2026 New Construction Insights Report, revealing a tale of two housing markets: an urban new construction market defined by scarcity and steep premiums, and a suburban one marked by stability and competitive pricing. The report finds that while new construction has shown remarkable resilience overall, where new homes are being built is shaping who can afford them and how much they will pay.

headline: Zillow Realtor Listing Share Puts Spotlight On News Digital Real Estate
summary: Zillow and Realtor.com have agreed to share pre market "Preview" residential listings across both platforms. The collaboration is aimed at giving home buyers and sellers broader visibility into upcoming listings before they officially hit the market. The move is material for News (NasdaqGS:NWSA), which owns Realtor.com, as it may influence traffic, listing exposure, and competitive position in online real estate.
